Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

Class AIcDocumentationLink

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationInlineElement
eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model.AIcDocumentationLink
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationInlineElement, AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess, AIiDocumentationLink, AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess
public class AIcDocumentationLink extends AIcDocumentationInlineElement implements AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess
Default implementation of AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess.

See AIiDocumentationLink for the read-only link contract.

  • Constructor Details

    • AIcDocumentationLink

      public AIcDocumentationLink(String aElementId, String aLabel, String aTarget, String aTitle)
      Creates a non-semantic inline link.
      Parameters:
      aElementId - stable element identifier
      aLabel - human-readable link label
      aTarget - renderer-neutral link target
      aTitle - human-readable link title, or an empty string if unavailable

  • Method Details

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns the human-readable link label.
      Specified by:
      getLabel in interface AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns:
      link label

    • getTarget

      public String getTarget()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns the link target.

      The target is renderer-neutral text, for example an absolute URL, a relative path, or an anchor expression understood by the renderer.

      Specified by:
      getTarget in interface AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns:
      link target

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Description copied from interface: AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns a human-readable link title.

      An empty string means that no title is available.

      Specified by:
      getTitle in interface AIiDocumentationLink
      Returns:
      link title, or an empty string if no title is available
